models.title: Atlas
models.info: Atlas sweeps a wide semantic area first, then tightens its guesses once it spots a stable region. Expect it to feel exploratory early and more decisive once a pattern clicks.

models.title: Spark
models.info: Spark leans toward sharp local similarities and quick pivots. It often acts like it has found a scent trail and is willing to commit harder to one neighborhood.

models.title: Drift
models.info: Drift moves through the board in softer arcs, linking words through broader thematic texture instead of direct jumps. Its rankings can feel mood-driven in a useful way.

models.title: Prism
models.info: Prism tends to separate close concepts by testing contrast as much as similarity. It is good for seeing where a puzzle splits into adjacent but distinct clusters.
